title: DescribeFleetUtilizationOutput
description: DescribeFleetUtilizationOutput schema from Amazon GameLift API

allOf.description: A collection of objects containing utilization information for each requested fleet ID. Utilization objects are returned only for fleets that currently exist.
A token that indicates where to resume retrieving results on the next call to this operation. If no token is returned, these results represent the end of the list.
